sglang.title: Eager Compiler for Torch Compile
sglang.author: Oasis-Git
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
To support piecewise cuda graph, previous compile backend sglang applies torch default compile backend as Inductor pattern compiler. While this compiler introduce better performance for native torch operations, it introduces a lot of additional issues especially with sgl kernels and cuda

sglang.title: support server arg override KV cache to bf16 to avoid slow cases
sglang.author: b8zhong
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Right now the KV cache (for most general quantized models) is automatically selected as the same dtype as the weights/activations. However most attn backends don't support this and the quant/dequant is super slow. Currently there is no way to override to bf16 through the server args.

Mod

sglang.author: Kindyaa
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This change was motivated by a real first-run failure when following the official example — it improves usability for everyone trying SGLang examples for the first time.
When I used examples/runtime/engine/fastapi_engine_inference.py to launch the server with Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct,

sglang.title: ci: update `lmms-eval` to speed up multimodal CI
sglang.author: b8zhong
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In the openai_compatible api of lmms-eval script, there seems to be a bug in the batch size before (see EvolvingLMMs-Lab/lmms-eval#835), as all the requests were still being processed sequentially. Since it was fixed recently, we should upgrade the version and it will make the ci faster.

All the docker release github flows have been updated to use BUILD_TYPE=all for both x86/arm builds.
However, the Dockerfile was not updated to respect this change.
Hence, it's not installing the correct DeepEP version for arm builds.

sglang.title: [router] Add Configurable L0 and L1 Tokenizer Caching
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR introduces a two-level tokenizer caching system that provides significant performance improvements for tokenization operations. The implementation features an L0 exact-match cache and an innovative L1 special-token boundary prefix cache
Motivation
Tokenization is a frequent operation

sglang.title: make sure logit bias is applied during eagle spec decoding verification
sglang.author: petricevich
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When EAGLE speculative decoding is turned on, the logit_bias parameter is ignored, as reported in issue 10617
Modifications
This PR adds a missing check for whether logit biases have been sent in the EAGLE verify function.
Accuracy Tests
I don't think this fix requires accuracy tests.
Ben

sglang.title: fix: do not wrap invalid grammar objects during constrained generation
sglang.author: tazjin
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Wrapping invalid grammar objects in the reasoner backend causes the scheduler's check for invalid grammars to not notice them.
This can lead to requests with invalid grammars (e.g. on regex validity issues) to be scheduled, eventually causing a crash when the invalid grammar is used for masking.
Thi

vllm.title: [Misc] Refactor `get_kv_cache_spec` into `AttentionLayerBase`
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR modifies the AttentionLayerBase interface to add a new get_kv_cache_spec method.
This allows different attention layers to define their own KV Cache spec, by making the spec entirely transparent to the Model Runner.
As a consequence, the runner can now limit itself to collect the specs witho

vllm.title: [BugFix] Disable fp8 kv-cache by default for DeepSeek V3.2
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
It appears the FP8 kv-cach is causing issues:

Accuracy issues reported with FULL_AND_PIECEWISE cudagraphs (default cudagraph mode)
DP/EP #27043 (NOTE: #26605 is still outstanding)

This is hopefully a temporary thing while we stabilize the fp8 kv-cache (which is the intended way to use the model);

This PR continues the effort to clean up vllm.utils by extracting hashing-related helper functions into a new, dedicated module vllm/utils/hashing.py.
The following functions have been moved:

vllm.utils.sha256_cbor -> vllm.utils.hashing.
